title: euphrasia purpurea var. randii
intro: Euphrasia purpurea var. randii, also known as the Himalayan eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia purpurea plant, which belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are effective in treating eye and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Euphrasia purpurea var. randii include relieving conjunctivitis, blepharitis, and other eye conditions, as well as treating sore throats and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and sinusitis. Euphrasia purpurea var. randii can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, with the dried leaves and flowers being used in infusions and the root being used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
